name: Vendor COI Verification
description: Maintenance verifies vendor insurance status, tracks expiry, and routes exceptions for PM review.

stages.name: Collect COI
stages.description: Request and capture vendor insurance evidence.

steps.title: Request COI from vendor
steps.instructions: Request current COI from the vendor using the approved vendor communication path.
steps.dispatch_body: Request current COI from vendor. Keep all external messaging approval-gated if required by current policy.

steps.title: Upload or link COI
steps.instructions: Attach the received COI or mark why it is unavailable.
steps.human_prompt: Attach received COI or record why it is unavailable.

steps.title: Verify COI coverage
steps.instructions: Extract carrier, policy dates, liability limits, and insured party. Flag missing/expired/insufficient coverage.
steps.dispatch_body: Verify COI coverage and flag missing or expired requirements.

steps.title: PM exception review
steps.instructions: Review any missing, expired, or insufficient coverage before vendor is marked compliant.
steps.human_prompt: Review COI exceptions before vendor is marked compliant.

stages.name: Track Renewal
stages.description: Record compliance and schedule expiry tracking.

steps.title: Record expiry tracking
steps.instructions: Record expiry date and schedule follow-up before expiration.
steps.dispatch_body: Record COI expiry tracking and follow-up needs.
